title: ADVENTURERS RESOURCES
body:
This is the official Resource Pack for Adventurers made by Alonsiko. It changes things like adding a new custom menu, splash texts, new dialogs for the mystical wise tree and more.

[ADVENTURERS MODPACK](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adventurers)

![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab878418f5f1bd7f49aa0734db3e230618b440bd.png)

This Resource Pack changes some dialogs of the mod [Mystical Oak Tree](https://modrinth.com/mod/mystical-oak-tree) by **Plantkillable**
